ModMetaData.name: Leeani Playable Race
ModMetaData.author: MikeRobe
ModMetaData.description:
A nice happy race of people-foxes. Now uses Biotech xenotypes with enhanced genes from Alpha Genes!
The Leeani are fox-like humanoids with fluffy tails and cheerful dispositions. Originally mundane foxes, their genetic modifications have allowed them many opportunities in a growing universe. They are naturally cheerful, adaptable, and resilient, with enhanced movement speed, dark vision, and psychic sensitivity.
Features: - Complete Leeani xenotype with custom and Alpha Genes integration - TWO distinct Leeani factions: * Leeani Holds - Medieval traditionalists living on planets * Leeani Starwalkers - Advanced orbital traders (NEW!) - Both factions maintain friendly relations despite different tech levels - Starting scenarios for Leeani colonies - Signature Leeani foods and brewing recipes - Plenty of backstories and names
Requirements: - Biotech DLC (required) - Alpha Genes mod (required)
Note: This version is incompatible with the old Humanoid Alien Races versions.
Suggestions? Find @MikeRobe on the Rimworld Discord.
